title: Slithering Strangler
move_pattern: Starts with Constrict. After Constrict, randomly picks either Thwack or Lash (both can repeat). After Thwack or Lash, returns to Constrict.
notes: The move ID in source code is 'TWACK' (apparent typo for THWACK); localization key is THWACK. Thwack both attacks and gains 5 Block in the same turn. Block amount is not ascension-scaled.
